nhl.headline: Vegas Golden Knights rule out William Karlsson for Game 6
nhl.summary: Center William Karlsson, injured in his team's Game 5 loss Thursday night, was ruled out by the Vegas Golden Knights on Saturday, a day before the Carolina Hurricanes, up 3-2 in the series, will try to win the Stanley Cup in Game 6 at T-Mobile Arena.

nhl.headline: Carolina fan chants 'just noise,' says Knights goalie Carter Hart
nhl.summary: Knights goalie Carter Hart, who is gearing up for Game 6 of the Stanley Cup Final, says chants from Hurricanes fans referencing a 2024 sexual assault charge he was later acquitted of are "just noise."

wnba.headline: Kelsey Plum, Kahleah Copper author dueling 40-point games
wnba.summary: Los Angeles Sparks guard Kelsey Plum had 43 points, and Phoenix Mercury guard Kahleah Copper finished with 41 on Saturday night, the first time opponents have had dueling 40-point games in WNBA history, including the postseason.

wnba.headline: Aces tighten grip on West lead in Commissioner's Cup with win over Lynx
wnba.summary: The Las Vegas Aces moved closer to their third appearance in the WNBA's Commissioner's Cup final with a 100-97 victory over the Minnesota Lynx on Saturday.

wnba.headline: WNBA players with the most points in a single game
wnba.summary: A'ja Wilson and Liz Cambage have notched the most points in a single WNBA game. Find out which other players make the list.

wnba.headline: Kelsey Plum scores a career-high 43 points in the Sparks' OT win over the Mercury
wnba.summary: — Kelsey Plum scored a career-high 43 points, offsetting Kahleah Copper's career-best 41-point effort and the Los Angeles Sparks beat the Phoenix Mercury 111-102 in overtime Saturday night to improve to 3-2 in Commissioner's Cup play.

wnba.headline: Phoenix Mercury vs. Los Angeles Sparks - Game Highlights
wnba.summary: Watch the Game Highlights from Phoenix Mercury vs. Los Angeles Sparks, 06/13/2026

wnba.headline: Fire beat the Wings 84-83 to end a 4-game losing streak
wnba.summary: — Bridget Carleton scored 20 points, Emily Engstler made the second of two free throws with two seconds left and the Portland Fire beat the Dallas Wings 84-83 on Saturday night in Commissioner's Cup play to end a four-game losing streak.

wnba.headline: Fire vs. Dallas Wings - Game Highlights
wnba.summary: Watch the Game Highlights from Fire vs. Dallas Wings, 06/13/2026

wnba.headline: A'ja Wilson leads the Aces past the Lynx 100-97 for West lead in Commissioner's Cup
wnba.summary: — A'ja Wilson had 24 points and 10 rebounds to offset a career-high 29 points from Minnesota rookie Olivia Miles and the Las Vegas Aces beat the Lynx 100-97 on Saturday night to take the West lead in the Commissioner's Cup.

wnba.headline: Fever's White denies discord within team after win over Sun
wnba.summary: Fever coach Stephanie White once more shut down reports and speculation about discord within the team following the Fever's victory Saturday over the Sun.

wnba.headline: Sophie Cunningham, Caitlin Clark lead the Fever past the Sun, 85-75
wnba.summary: — Sophie Cunningham hit three 3-pointers and scored the final 11 points for Indiana, helping the Fever beat the Connecticut Sun 85-75 on Saturday night to improve to 4-1 in Commissioner's Cup play.

wnba.headline: Wings' Bueckers out vs. Fire, day-to-day with ankle injury
wnba.summary: Wings star Paige Bueckers missed Saturday's game against the Fire and will be day to day with a right ankle injury.

ncaab.headline: Volchko's record 15 strikeouts lead Georgia past Texas
ncaab.summary: Georgia's Joey Volchko struck out 15 batters -- a school record for the Men's College World Series -- in a complete-game masterpiece to lead the Bulldogs to a 7-1 victory over Texas on Saturday at Charles Schwab Field in Omaha, Nebraska.

ncaab.headline: Georgia's Joey Volchko enjoys Sour Power after stellar night on the mound
ncaab.summary: Volchko is stacked with Sour Power while explaining how the Bulldogs' offense makes it easy for him on the mound after dealing 15 Ks to advance in the MCWS Opener against the Longhorns.

ncaab.headline: Highlight: Oklahoma shuts out 7-seed Alabama in MCWS first round
ncaab.summary: The Sooners post the largest shutout win in a Men's College World Series opener since 2002 as they beat the Crimson Tide, 9-0.

ncaab.headline: Highlight: Joey Volchko spins heat, UGA takes down Texas in MCWS opening round
ncaab.summary: Volchko throws a complete game and sets a career high 15 strikeouts as Rylan Lujo drills a home run and brings in three RBI as the Bulldogs take down the Longhorns, 7-1.

tennis.headline: Roger Federer to take part in US Open exhibition event
tennis.summary: Roger Federer will play in an exhibition at the US Open this year, returning to the Grand Slam tournament that he is the only player to win five consecutive times.

tennis.headline: Zverev wins his first Grand Slam title in five-set thriller
tennis.summary: Alexander Zverev defeats Flavio Cobolli in the 2026 Roland-Garros men's final to claim his maiden Grand Slam championship.

tennis.headline: Alexander Zverev reflects after winning French Open
tennis.summary: Alexander Zverev reflects after winning French Open

tennis.headline: French Open: How Alexander Zverev finally won a major title
tennis.summary: Facing a wide-open field, Zverev captured his first Grand Slam title -- something he might have doubted would ever happen.

tennis.headline: Alexander Zverev wins French Open, finally claims 1st Grand Slam title
tennis.summary: Alexander Zverev beat Flavio Cobolli 6-1, 4-6, 6-4, 6-7 (5), 6-1 to win the French Open title.

f1.summary: Formula 1 heads to Spain for the Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix and Mercedes' Kimi Antonelli remains the driver to beat.

f1.headline: Russell feeling 'back at one with the car' after Barcelona pole
f1.summary: Russell feeling 'back at one with the car' after Barcelona pole

f1.headline: Barcelona-Catalunya GP: Lewis Hamilton warns 'fight is on' to former teammate George Russell
f1.summary: Lewis Hamilton surprised himself by joining former teammate George Russell on the front row of the grid for Sunday's Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix, and says Ferrari closing the gap to Mercedes is proof "the fight is on."

f1.headline: Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix: George Russell 'feels like old self' after commanding pole
f1.summary: George Russell has said he went "back to basics" and felt more like his old self again after claiming what could be a season-reviving pole position at the Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix.

f1.headline: Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix: Ferrari's Charles Leclerc 'ashamed' after qualifying crash
f1.summary: Ferrari's Charles Leclerc has said he felt "very ashamed" about crashing out of qualifying at the Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix, which he refused to blame on recent brake changes.

f1.headline: Barcelona-Catalunya GP: Lance Stroll outqualified teammate Fernando Alonso: 'I don't care'
f1.summary: Lance Stroll took no joy from qualifying ahead of Aston Martin teammate Fernando Alonso for the first time in 42 grands prix at this weekend's Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix.

football.headline: Former NFL defensive lineman Aldon Smith dies at age 36

football.headline: Miami Dolphins linebackers embracing competition
football.summary: Miami drafted two off-ball linebackers in April. Veterans Jordyn Brooks and Tyrel Dodson are welcoming them in.

football.headline: Broncos coordinator Davis Webb embracing role as playcaller
football.summary: Sean Payton has rarely ceded playcalling duties in the past, which is a testament to his faith in Webb, his new 31-year-old offensive coordinator.
